summary.deduplication_basis: manual review against run22-run27 and freemium batch known opportunities; canonical platform names and submission URLs are new

platforms.name: WMSE 91.7FM Milwaukee Music Department Submission Route
platforms.manual_review_reason: WMSE accepts public music submissions through physical media and a Music Director email/WeTransfer path, but review by the Music Department, FCC-clean checks, file preparation and non-automated outreach are required.

platforms.name: KCSB 91.9 FM Artist Inquiry and Music Library Submission Form
platforms.manual_review_reason: KCSB exposes an official Artist Inquiry route and links to an external Google Form for live on-air, event, music library and premiere consideration. Manual review is required because the form is external and may contain validation, eligibility or anti-spam controls.

platforms.name: CJSR 88.5 FM Edmonton Music Submission Route
platforms.manual_review_reason: CJSR accepts digital albums/EPs by public music email and physical media by mail/drop-off, but rejects paid streaming-only links and singles, requires downloadable files and content metadata, and includes a separate paid advertising upsell that must remain blocked.

platforms.name: CFUV 101.9 FM Victoria Music Submissions
platforms.manual_review_reason: CFUV requires at least three unique tracks, 320kbps MP3 digital download links and complete biography/tracklisting metadata; physical submissions are restricted mostly to local artists or special cases. Manual review is required for eligibility and asset preparation.

platforms.name: Radio Western 94.9FM Music Submission Email Route
platforms.manual_review_reason: Radio Western official temporary page states the main web server is damaged but explicitly routes new music submissions and promotion to music@radiowestern.ca. Manual review is required because the site is degraded and no detailed asset policy is visible.
